hero.text: Today is a new opportunity to make the most of your talents.
hero.author: Unknown

aries.general: Embrace the change, as new opportunities are on the horizon.
aries.love: Passion reignites; it's time to express your feelings openly.
aries.career: Your leadership skills will shine in a team project.

taurus.general: Stability will come through patience; take your time.
taurus.love: A romantic surprise awaits you; be ready for it.
taurus.career: Focus on building strong relationships to advance your goals.

gemini.general: Communication is key; open dialogues will lead to revelations.
gemini.love: A close friend may turn into something more; keep your eyes open.
gemini.career: Your ideas will be welcomed; don't hesitate to share them.

cancer.general: Nurturing yourself is important; prioritize self-care today.
cancer.love: Emotional connections deepen; share your heart openly.
cancer.career: Collaboration brings success; work together with colleagues.

leo.general: Your confidence shines today; seize every opportunity.
leo.love: Adventurous plans with a partner will reignite your romance.
leo.career: Take the lead on a project; others will follow your vision.

virgo.general: Practical decisions will lead to stability; trust your instincts.
virgo.love: Open communication fosters trust in your relationship.
virgo.career: Attention to detail will win you allies at work.

libra.general: Balance is key; seek harmony in all your interactions.
libra.love: A romantic evening could bring unforeseen joy to your life.
libra.career: Negotiation skills will be vital in upcoming discussions.

scorpio.general: A transformative day ahead; embrace the possibilities.
scorpio.love: A deep connection can form; trust your instincts.
scorpio.career: Your ambition will attract attention; make your move.

sagittarius.general: Adventure calls; step outside your comfort zone today.
sagittarius.love: A spontaneous date could strengthen your relationship.
sagittarius.career: Risk-taking pays off; don’t be afraid to lead the charge.

capricorn.general: Focus on your long-term goals; patience will pay off.
capricorn.love: Building a solid foundation in love is possible today.
capricorn.career: Planning and organization will lead to success.

aquarius.general: Innovation brings excitement; your ideas are valued.
aquarius.love: Open-mindedness in love leads to unexpected connections.
aquarius.career: Collaborative projects will bring great success.

pisces.general: Creative ventures flourish; trust your intuition today.
pisces.love: A romantic gesture will deepen your emotional bond.
pisces.career: Follow your heart in your professional endeavors.

professional.text: Success doesn't come from what you do occasionally, it comes from what you do consistently.
professional.author: Marie Forleo

professional.text: Opportunities don't happen. You create them.
professional.author: Chris Grosser

professional.text: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
professional.author: Steve Jobs

professional.text: Dream big and dare to fail.
professional.author: Norman Vaughan

professional.text: Your work is going to fill a large part of your life, and the only way to be truly satisfied is to do what you believe is great work.
professional.author: Steve Jobs

professional.text: The future depends on what you do today.
professional.author: Mahatma Gandhi

motivation.text: Push yourself, because no one else is going to do it for you.
motivation.author: Unknown

motivation.text: Great things never come from comfort zones.
motivation.author: Unknown

motivation.text: Dream it. Wish it. Do it.
motivation.author: Unknown

motivation.text: Success doesn’t just find you. You have to go out and get it.
motivation.author: Unknown

motivation.text: The harder you work for something, the greater you'll feel when you achieve it.
motivation.author: Unknown

captions.text: Stay positive, work hard, make it happen.
captions.author: Unknown

captions.text: Good things come to those who hustle.
captions.author: Unknown

captions.text: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
captions.author: Theodore Roosevelt

captions.text: Don't watch the clock; do what it does. Keep going.
captions.author: Sam Levenson

captions.text: Life is 10% what happens to us and 90% how we react to it.
captions.author: Charles R. Swindoll

captions.text: Act as if what you do makes a difference. It does.
captions.author: William James

tech.text: Technology is best when it brings people together.
tech.author: Matt Mullenweg

tech.text: Everyone should have access to the tools they need to make a wonderful world.
tech.author: Tim Berners-Lee

tech.text: It’s not a faith in technology. It’s faith in people.
tech.author: Steve Jobs

tech.text: The great growling engine of change – technology.
tech.author: Alvin Toffler

tech.text: The science of today is the technology of tomorrow.
tech.author: Edward Teller

tech.text: Any sufficiently advanced technology is indistinguishable from magic.
tech.author: Arthur C. Clarke

fun.text: Why don’t scientists trust atoms? Because they make up everything!
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: I told my computer I needed a break, and now it won’t stop sending me beach wallpapers.
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: Parallel lines have so much in common. It’s a shame they’ll never meet.
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: What do you call fake spaghetti? An impasta!
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: I would tell you a joke about pizza, but it’s a little cheesy.
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: Why was the math book sad? Because it had too many problems.
fun.author: Unknown

faith.text: Faith is taking the first step even when you don't see the whole staircase.
faith.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

faith.text: Faith is the strength by which a shattered world shall emerge into the light.
faith.author: Helen Keller

faith.text: Faith is not belief without proof, but trust without reservation.
faith.author: Vincenzo Orazio

faith.text: Our faith in tomorrow will help build our today.
faith.author: Unknown

faith.text: Believe you can and you’re halfway there.
faith.author: Theodore Roosevelt

faith.text: With faith, all things are possible.
faith.author: Matthew 19:26

wisdom.text: The only true wisdom is in knowing you know nothing.
wisdom.author: Socrates

wisdom.text: In seeking wisdom, we are seeking ourselves.
wisdom.author: Unknown

wisdom.text: The fool doth think he is wise, but the wise man knows himself to be a fool.
wisdom.author: William Shakespeare

wisdom.text: Character is what you are in the dark.
wisdom.author: Dwight L. Moody

wisdom.text: Knowing yourself is the beginning of all wisdom.
wisdom.author: Aristotle
